\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4457 introduces Greens Function Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{G}_{\alpha\mu\nu} = \partial_\alpha g_{\mu\nu}^T \equiv \mathcal{M}_{\mu\nu} \cdot \nabla_\alpha \left[ \frac{\Phi_{\text{TZP}}}{P_T} \right] \cdot \chi_T$$
